title: rosa pendulina subvar. acanthodermis
intro: Rosa pendulina subvar. acanthodermis, also known as the alpine rose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The medicinal properties of Rosa pendulina subvar. acanthodermis include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, which can help in treating conditions such as kidney stones, arthritis, and oxidative stress. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Rosa pendulina subvar. acanthodermis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, and its flowers and leaves can be dried and used in traditional medicine.
